3245190.name: Arjybeasts
3245190.description:
When viewed through playful eyes, a normal desktop computer becomes a game called 'Arjybeasts', a one-of-a-kind Turn-Based RPG where creativity meets strategy. 

Draw your own silly characters in Pant. The colours of the pixels you pick will matter in battle!

DELETE THOSE STUPID DRAWINGS

Be warned, you aren't the only one using the computer... He doesn't like what you're doing, he's boring... Your imagination is frowned upon, your terrible drawings are holding him back.

I DON'T WANT TO BE DELETED

'Arjybeasts' are image files that start battles with you when you try and delete them.

The colors you picked earlier weren't just for looks...

A GAME WHERE COLOR OF YOUR CHARACTER MATTERS

  • Red for aggressive attacks

  • Green for defense

  • Blue for magical game-changers.

You must balance the strategy of the colours you pick against the colours you want for looks.

KNOCK KNOCK...

You only have so long until it's his turn on the computer. Experience the computer from another perspective once your time runs out... Things might not be as simple as they seem.

Arjybeasts isn’t just a game; it’s an artistic journey full of surprises.
3245190.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
